nasb.text: For the heavy drinker and the glutton will come to poverty, And drowsiness will clothe one with rags.

esv.text: for the drunkard and the glutton will come to poverty, and slumber will clothe them with rags.

cnv.text: 因為酗酒暴食的人必致窮乏； 貪睡的人必穿破衣。

ccb.text: 因为好酒贪吃者必穷困， 贪睡的人必穿破衣烂衫。

csbs.text: 因为酗酒和贪吃的必陷入穷困， 而贪睡的必穿破烂衣服。
